# Area 10.3 — Ollama Provider Configuration

**Package:** `repcheck.llm.adapter.providers`

## OllamaProviderConfig — Sidecar Config

PureConfig auto-derived configuration for the Ollama sidecar.

```scala
case class OllamaProviderConfig(
  baseUrl: String = "http://localhost:11434",
  model: String = "llama3.2:1b",
  timeoutSeconds: Int,
  firstCallTimeoutSeconds: Int
)
```

- `baseUrl` — localhost only; Ollama runs as sidecar in same Cloud Run Job
- `model` — default `llama3.2:1b`
- `timeoutSeconds` — standard per-request timeout (model already loaded)
- `firstCallTimeoutSeconds` — generous timeout (10-30s) for initial request when model loads into memory
- No `maxRetries` field; retries via shared `LlmRetryWrapper` (10.2) with `LlmRetryConfig`

## SectionParseResult — Section Parsing Output

Structured output type returned by `OllamaProvider.completeStructured[List[SectionParseResult]]` when parsing bill text into sections. Requires Circe semi-auto `Decoder` in companion object.

```scala
case class SectionParseResult(
  sectionIndex: Int,
  sectionIdentifier: Option[String],
  heading: Option[String],
  content: String
)

object SectionParseResult {
  implicit val decoder: Decoder[SectionParseResult] = deriveDecoder
}
```

- `sectionIndex` — 0-based ordinal position within bill
- `sectionIdentifier` — e.g., "Sec. 101", "Title I"; absent in plain text
- `heading` — section heading if present in source
- `content` — full section text

## Error Types

`OllamaCallFailed` removed from `llm-adapter`; library is domain-agnostic. Transport failures produce `LlmCallFailed` (10.2). Domain-specific error wrapping (adding `billId`) happens in consuming pipeline by catching `LlmCallFailed` and wrapping in `DecompositionFailed` (10.4).

## Key Design Decisions

1. Ollama is a `LlmProvider` implementation sharing `LlmRequest`/`LlmResponse`, `StructuredOutputEnforcer`, and retry logic with `ClaudeProvider`; HTTP transport instead of SDK
2. Localhost communication only; no network hops or authentication
3. Format-agnostic parsing; LLM identifies section boundaries regardless of input format
4. Separate first-call timeout (10-30s model loading) vs. subsequent calls
5. Graceful degradation; if parsing fails, whole bill treated as one section
6. Generic errors from `llm-adapter`; domain wrapping in consuming pipeline

## Acceptance Criteria

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| `OllamaProviderConfig` loads from config with defaults | Default config → `baseUrl` is `http://localhost:11434`, `model` is `llama3.2:1b` |
| `OllamaProviderConfig` allows override of all fields | Custom config → verify all fields overridden |
| `OllamaProviderConfig` has no `maxRetries` field | Transport retries via `LlmRetryWrapper` only |
| `SectionParseResult` decodes from valid JSON via Circe | `{"sectionIndex": 0, "heading": "Title I", "content": "..."}` → decoded |
| `SectionParseResult` handles absent optional fields | No `sectionIdentifier` or `heading` → `None` values |
| `SectionParseResult` preserves section ordering | List of 5 results → `sectionIndex` 0..4 in order |
| `SectionParseResult` Circe Decoder derived in companion | Companion object has `implicit val decoder: Decoder[SectionParseResult]` |
| First call timeout longer than standard timeout | `firstCallTimeoutSeconds > timeoutSeconds` in default config |
| Section parsing handles XML-formatted bill text | XML bill → sections identified by XML structure |
| Section parsing handles plain text bill | Plain text → sections identified by headings/numbering |
| Section parsing handles PDF-extracted text | Irregular whitespace/formatting → sections still identified |
| Transport failure produces `LlmCallFailed`, not domain error | Ollama 500 → `LlmCallFailed` raised (no `billId` in error) |
